text.title: UI Component Library Core Rules
text.summary: Testable rules grounding the UI Component Library methodology. Every rule pairs a binary check with sourced rationale, plus the universal skip-this-methodology gate.

rule.statement: Library MUST organise components in 4 layers: `tokens/`, `primitives/` (atoms), `patterns/` (molecules), `templates/` (organisms / page layouts); flat structure is forbidden.
rule.rationale: Layered architecture surfaces blast radius (token change vs primitive vs template); flat structures hide dependency depth.

rule.statement: Every component MUST have a Storybook story covering ALL states: default, hover, focus, active, disabled, loading, empty, error; missing states are rejected.
rule.rationale: States not in stories are not visually verified and not tested by visual regression; production-only state bugs result.

rule.statement: Every story MUST run axe-core in CI; violations block merge.
rule.rationale: Manual a11y review misses 50%+ of issues; automated axe catches contrast / role / aria violations consistently.

rule.statement: Library MUST wire visual regression (Chromatic / Percy / playwright-snapshot) on every PR; un-reviewed visual diffs block merge.
rule.rationale: Without snapshot, UI regressions slip in via prop or token edits; CI snapshot makes them visible at PR.

rule.statement: Releases MUST follow semver (major for breaking, minor for additive, patch for fix) + CHANGELOG entry; ad-hoc tagging is forbidden.
rule.rationale: Consumers cannot upgrade safely without versioning discipline; minor releases that break the API destroy trust.

rule.statement: Breaking changes MUST emit a deprecation warning in the minor before the major; deprecation timeline MUST be documented (e.g. 2 minors).
rule.rationale: Surprise breakage takes weeks to fix in downstream apps; explicit timeline + warning gives owners runway.

rule.statement: Library components MUST NOT import business APIs, app-specific state, or feature flags; library stays generic.
rule.rationale: Business imports defeat reuse and force every consumer to wire app-specific deps.

rule.statement: Apply this methodology only if all entries in `## Applies If` hold and none of `## Skip If` triggers; otherwise abort and route to the correct methodology.

rationale.source: F-066 spec - decision tree minimum form

rule.rationale: A misrouted methodology produces wrong-shape output; the explicit skip rule is the universal default branch from the decision tree.
